# Example profiles

Curated renderings of the template. Each profile is an answer set that guards a specific code path. The pre-task snapshot lives in `examples/rendered/<profile>/` (browse it for a real generated project); CI validates the post-task build + tests for every profile.

## Coverage matrix

| profile | frontend | example | auth | mailer | verify | caching | eventing | payments | push | storage | agent |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [`jwt-basic`](#jwt-basic) | ✓ | ✓ | jwt-basic | · | · | redis | · | · | · | · | ✓ |
| [`jwt-full-otp`](#jwt-full-otp) | ✓ | ✓ | jwt-full | ✓ | otp | redis | · | · | · | · | ✓ |
| [`kitchen-sink`](#kitchen-sink) | ✓ | ✓ | jwt-full | ✓ | token | redis | kafka-redpanda | razorpay | firebase | s3 | ✓ |
| [`minimal`](#minimal) | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | · | ✓ |

Legend: `✓` enabled · `·` off/none · otherwise the chosen value.

## Profiles

### jwt-basic

**JWT basic (signup + login)** — Guards the jwt-basic auth path: JWT issue/verify without verification or refresh-token machinery.

Guards:
- auth=jwt-basic (jwt.go + service.go, but NO service_tokens.go)
- mailer/verification_method absent (gated behind auth=jwt-full)
- example domain present alongside auth (sqlc generates both)

Validated by: `go build`, `go vet`, `go test`, `flutter analyze`, `flutter test`

Snapshot: [`examples/rendered/jwt-basic/`](rendered/jwt-basic)

### jwt-full-otp

**JWT full + OTP verification (default)** — Mirrors copier.yml defaults — the headline configuration most users generate.

Guards:
- auth=jwt-full (service_tokens.go, refresh tokens, /auth/me)
- verification_method=otp (otp_screen.dart + OTP service path)
- mailer=true (SMTP/Mailpit transport; tokens never returned in API response)
- full frontend auth wiring (auth_controller, router redirects)

Validated by: `go build`, `go vet`, `go test`, `flutter analyze`, `flutter test`, `docker smoke`

Snapshot: [`examples/rendered/jwt-full-otp/`](rendered/jwt-full-otp)

### kitchen-sink

**Kitchen sink (everything on)** — Ceiling profile — every module enabled; catches cross-module integration conflicts.

Guards:
- auth=jwt-full + verification_method=token (link path, complements jwt-full-otp)
- eventing=kafka-redpanda, payments=razorpay, push=firebase, object_storage=s3 wired together
- all docker-compose services compose without port/config collisions

Validated by: `go build`, `go vet`, `go test`, `flutter analyze`, `flutter test`, `docker smoke`

Snapshot: [`examples/rendered/kitchen-sink/`](rendered/kitchen-sink)

### minimal

**Minimal backend** — Floor profile — bare Go service, no auth, no frontend, no example domain.

Guards:
- auth=none file set (no auth/ package generated)
- include_example_domain=false (no items domain, sqlc has nothing to gen)
- include_frontend=false (server-only _tasks path: api build runs standalone)

Validated by: `go build`, `go vet`, `go test`, `docker build`

Snapshot: [`examples/rendered/minimal/`](rendered/minimal)
